title: bromus caroli-henrici subsp. biaristulatus
intro: Bromus caroli-henrici subsp. biaristulatus, also known as Brome grass, is a subspecies of the Brome species, which is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. Traditionally, Brome grass has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brome grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Brome grass can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems.
